zh.lifeSummary: 當Egelina de Courtenay於1155年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay25歲，母親Matilda6歲。她於大約1175年與Gilbert Basset在英國奧可福爾比斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1213年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾比斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egelina de Courtenay于1155年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay25岁，母亲Matilda6岁。她于大约1175年与Gilbert Basset在英国奧可福爾比斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1213年在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾比斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Egelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the girl's name Evelyn , or a combination of Eve with the suffix -lina.

en.lifeSummary: When Egelina de Courtenay was born in 1155, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, was 25 and her mother, Matilda, was 6. She married Gilbert Basset about 1175, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1213, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egelina de Courtenay est née en 1155, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Basset environ 1175, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1213, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egelina de Courtenay 1155 in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay 25 und ihre Mutter Matilda 6. Sie hat um 1175 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England Gilbert Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1213 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina de Courtenay è nata il nel 1155 nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Matilda, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Basset circa 1175, nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1213, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Bicester, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.Bicester, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスター
ja.lifeSummary: Egelina de Courtenayが1155年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenayは25歳，母Matildaは6歳であった。約1175年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターでGilbert Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1213年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで58歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egelina de Courtenay(이)가 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 대략 1175년 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 Gilbert Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Okehampton, Devonshire, England, Great B: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Headington, Oxfordshire, England: Headington, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina de Courtenay nasceu em 1155, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Basset aproximadamente 1175, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1213, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egelina de Courtenay родилась в 1155 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Basset около 1175 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1213 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egelina de Courtenay nació en 1155, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Matilda, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Gilbert Basset aproximadamente 1175, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1213, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
